results.title: Kriti Sanon-Kabir Bahia Breakup Rumours Explained: Truth Behind His Viral Photos With Another Girl
results.description: A few recent pictures of businessman Kabir Bahia with another woman have sparked speculation about an alleged potential breakup with actress Kriti Sanon. However, sources close to Bahia have clarified that the woman in the pictures is a family friend, squashing the rumours as baseless.

results.title: Making India a Centre of excellence pilot training: Simaero CEO Nicolas Moute
results.description: India will need over 22,000 pilots by 2030. Pilot training is expensive and majority of airlines send their pilots abroad for training. Simaero to invest $100 million in India for training 5,000 pilots.

results.title: Nagal wins Intaro Open for first Challenger title in over two years
results.description: Indian tennis star Sumit Nagal ended a two-year title drought by defeating France's Felix Balshaw 6-3, 7-5 to win the Intaro Open in Romania. The clay-court victory marks Nagal's seventh ATP Challenger title, boosting his world ranking to around 219

results.title: Korea's World Cup Exit Deals Blow to TV Ratings, Ad Sales
results.description: South Korea's exit from the 2026 World Cup round of 32 has hit broadcasters' ad sales and ratings, with hopes now resting on Messi and Ronaldo's likely final tournament.

results.title: Hati Besha of Lord Jagannath to Be Held from 4 PM During Snana Yatra
results.description: #ଅପର ାହ୍ନ_୪ଟାରୁ_ହାତୀବେଶ ଶ୍ରୀମନ୍ଦିରରେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ସ୍ନାନଯାତ୍ରା ପାଇଁ ନୀତି ନିର୍ଘଣ୍ଟ । ଭୋର୍ ୫ଟାରୁ ୭ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ପହଣ୍ଡି ହେବ । ଦିନ ୧୨ଟାରୁ ୨ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଜଳ ବିଜେ ଓ ସ୍ନାନ ନୀତି ସଂପନ୍ନ । ଅପରାହ୍ନ ୪ଟାରୁ ୫ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହାତୀ ବେଶ ହେବ । ସଂଧ୍ୟା ୭ଟା ୩୦ରୁ ୯ଟା ୩୦ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସାହାଣମେଲା ଦର୍ଶନ । ରାତି ୧୧ରୁ ୨ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ବାହୁଡ଼ା ପହଣ୍ଡି । #SnanaYatra #HatiBesha #JagannathTemple #Puri #JagannathCulture #DevSnanaPurnima #PuriNews #OdishaNews #OdishaTV #OTV The ritual schedule for the annual Snana Yatra of Lord Jagannath at the Shree Jagannath Temple has been finalised. As per the schedule, the Pahandi ritual will be conducted between 5 AM and 7 AM, followed by Jal Bije and the ceremonial bathing rituals from 12 PM to 2 PM. One of the major attractions of the festival, the Hati Besha (Elephant Attire) of the deities, will take place between 4 PM and 5 PM. Devotees will be allowed Sahana Mela darshan from 7:30 PM to 9:30 PM. The Bahuda Pahandi ritual, marking the return procession of the deities, is scheduled between 11 PM and 2 AM. Thousands of devotees are expected to witness the sacred Snana Yatra rituals at the Shree Jagannath Temple. results.title: Vietnam deploys military disaster relief team to earthquake-hit Venezuela
results.description: During the mission, the Vietnamese force will use search dogs to locate victims trapped under collapsed structures, conduct urban search-and-rescue operations, provide emergency medical assistance to survivors, and carry out other humanitarian tasks to help Venezuelan authorities and local communities recover from the disaster. results.title: South Gyeongsang Launches 106-km Nakdong River Waterfront Study With 8 Cities
